---
author: ""
header-includes:
   - \usepackage{rotating}
   - \usepackage{float}
   - \usepackage{natbib}
   - \usepackage{booktabs}
   - \usepackage{multirow}
geometry: "left=1cm,right=1cm,top=0.9cm,bottom=1.2cm"
output: 
  pdf_document:
    citation_package: natbib
    keep_tex: true
    number_sections: true
#bibliography: ref.bib
link-citations: yes
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, results = 'asis', warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())
options(xtable.comment = FALSE)
library(reshape)
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(naniar)
library(scales)
library(tidyr)
library(xtable)
library(pracma)
library(this.path)
setwd(this.path::this.dir())
options(width = 180)

data <- readRDS("../../tmp/drs/estimation/wb_hetero/reg_results.RDS")[ret_type == "benchmark_adj_gret"][, ret_type := NULL]
data[, coef := 100 * coef]
data[, se := 100 * se]

# choose vars
tmp <- unique(data[, list(var)])
tmp <- tmp[var != "(Intercept)"]
tmp <- tmp[!(var %in% paste0("as.factor.bin.", 2:4))]
tmp[, var_idx := c(3, 1, 2, 4:6)]
data <- merge(data, tmp, by = "var")
data[, var := paste0(var_idx, "_", var)]
rm(tmp)

# mark specifications
tmp <- unique(data[, .(sort_type)])[order(sort_type)]
tmp[, spec_idx <- c(2, 3, 1)]
data <- merge(data, tmp, by = "sort_type", all.x = T)
rm(tmp)

# add stars
cuts <- abs(qnorm(c(.01, .05, .1) / 2))
data[, abs_tstat := abs(coef / se)]
data[, ss := ifelse(abs_tstat > cuts[1], 3, ifelse(abs_tstat > cuts[2], 2, ifelse(abs_tstat > cuts[3], 1, 0)))]
data[, coef_lab := paste0("$", sprintf("%.3f", coef))]
data[, ss_lab := sapply(data[, ss], function(x) {
  ifelse(x > 0,
    paste0("^{", strcat(rep("*", x)), "}$"),
    "$"
  )
})]
data[, coef_lab := paste0(coef_lab, ss_lab)]
data[, ss_lab := NULL]
data[, se_lab := paste0("$(", sprintf("%.3f", se), ")$")]
rm(cuts)
data[, c("abs_tstat", "var_idx", "ss", "coef", "se") := NULL]

# mark spec_idx
tmp <- unique(data[, .(sort_type)])[order(sort_type)]
tmp[, spec_idx := c(2, 3, 1)]
data <- merge(data, tmp, by = "sort_type")
rm(tmp)

# merge with sort var
tt <- copy(data)

tmp <- readRDS("../../tmp/drs/estimation/wb_hetero/sort_var.RDS")
tmp[sort_type == "ner", sort_value := 12 * sort_value]
tmp[sort_type == "tracking_error", sort_value := sqrt(12) * 100 * sort_value]

tmp[, var := ifelse(bin == 1, "lag_logtna", paste0("lag_logtna.as.factor.bin.", bin))]
tmp[, var := paste0((bin + 2), "_", var)]
tmp[, bin := NULL]
tt <- merge(tt, tmp, by = c("sort_type", "var"), all.x = T)
rm(tmp)

tt[, coef_lab := sprintf("%.2f", sort_value)]
tt[coef_lab == "NA", coef_lab := ""]
tt[, se_lab := ""]
tt[, sort_value := NULL]
tt[, spec_idx := spec_idx + 3]

data <- rbind(data, tt)
rm(tt)

# parse obs, r2
data[, nobs := comma(nobs)]
data[, marginalR2 := sprintf("%.3f", marginalR2)]

# put together
est <- cast(data[, list(var, spec_idx, coef_lab)], var ~ spec_idx) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(group_id = 100 * row_number(), type = "coef") %>%
  as.data.table()
est[is.na(est)] <- ""
est[, var := c("$\\phi_i$", "$q_{i,0}$", "$q_{i,t-1}$", "$q_{i,t-1} \\times \\text{Bin2}$", "$q_{i,t-1} \\times \\text{Bin3}$", "$q_{i,t-1} \\times \\text{Bin4}$")]

se <- cast(data[, list(var, spec_idx, se_lab)], var ~ spec_idx) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(group_id = 100 * row_number() + 1, type = "se_lab") %>%
  mutate(var = "") %>%
  as.data.table()
se[is.na(se)] <- ""

tbl <- rbind(est, se)[order(group_id)]
rm(est, se)

# # note controls
# ctrls <- data.table(
#   var = c("Fund FE", "Date FE"),
#   `1` = c("Y", "Y"), `2` = c("Y", "Y"),
#   `3` = c("Y", "N"), `4` = c("Y", "N"), group_id = 1000 + 0:1, type = ""
# )
# tbl <- bind_rows(tbl, ctrls)
# rm(ctrls)

obs_and_r2 <- unique(data[, list(spec_idx, obs = nobs, r2 = marginalR2)]) %>%
  mutate(
    obs = ifelse(spec_idx <= 3, obs, ""),
    r2 = ifelse(spec_idx <= 3, r2, "")
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(., -spec_idx) %>%
  pivot_wider(name, names_from = "spec_idx", values_from = "value") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(name = replace(name, name == "r2", "Adj $R^2$")) %>%
  mutate(name = replace(name, name == "obs", "Obs")) %>%
  rename(var = name) %>%
  mutate(group_id = 2000 + 0:1, type = "")
tbl <- bind_rows(tbl, obs_and_r2)
tbl[, c("group_id", "type") := NULL]
rm(obs_and_r2)

col_names <- data.table(t(as.data.frame(c("", paste0("(", 1:3, ")"), paste0("(", 1:3, "b)")))))
names(col_names) <- names(tbl)
tbl <- rbind(col_names, tbl)
rm(col_names)

align_vactor <- paste0("ll", paste0(rep("c", times = ncol(tbl) - 1), collapse = ""))
x.side <- xtable(tbl, align = align_vactor)

this_add_to_row <- list(
  pos = list(-1, 0, 12, nrow(tbl)),
  command = c(
    "\\toprule & \\multicolumn{3}{c}{Dependent variable: $r_{i,t}~(\\%)$ } & \\multicolumn{3}{c}{Sorting variable values} \\\\\n \\cmidrule(l){2-4} \\cmidrule(l){5-7}
    Sorting var: & Tracking error & Exp ratio & SMB loading & Tracking error & Exp ratio & SMB loading \\\\\n \\cmidrule(l){2-4} \\cmidrule(l){5-7}",
    rep("\\vspace{5pt}", 2),
    "\\bottomrule \n"
  )
)

print(x.side,
  type = "latex",
  table.placement = "!ht",
  include.rownames = FALSE,
  include.colnames = FALSE,
  tabular.environment = "tabular",
  caption.placement = NULL, # "top", NULL
  hline.after = NULL, # We don't need hline; we use booktabs
  floating = FALSE, # whether \begin{Table} should be created (TRUE) or not (FALSE)
  sanitize.text.function = force, # Important to treat content of first column as latex function
  add.to.row = this_add_to_row
)

print(x.side,
  type = "latex",
  table.placement = "!ht",
  include.rownames = FALSE,
  include.colnames = FALSE,
  tabular.environment = "tabular",
  caption.placement = NULL, # "top", NULL
  hline.after = NULL, # We don't need hline; we use booktabs
  floating = FALSE, # whether \begin{Table} should be created (TRUE) or not (FALSE)
  sanitize.text.function = force, # Important to treat content of first column as latex function
  add.to.row = this_add_to_row,
  file = "reg_wb_heterogeneity.tex"
)
```
